description_blurb: This is an FBI 302 interview conducted with a US citizen regarding their first-hand account of a UAP encounter at a US test site. USPER described an object "metallic/gray in color."
title: FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 4
summary: This is an FBI 302 interview conducted with a US citizen regarding their first-hand account of a UAP encounter at a US test site. The witness, a USPER, described a cigar-shaped object that was metallic bronze in color with an intense diamond white light. The object was observed hovering and slowly moving from east to west before it disappeared. The witness also reported a gate malfunction just prior to the sighting. Another contractor also witnessed the object.
reported_object_description: A cigar shaped object with an extremely bright, intense diamond white light with a ring around it, located on the eastern end. The light was pointing southeast and was like looking into the sun. The object was 'metallic bronze in color' and was the length of two or three Blackhawk helicopters lined up nose to tail, with a width of approximately one and a half Blackhawks. It was completely silent.
reported_behavior: The object was almost hovering, slowly moving from east to west. It then disappeared after five to ten seconds. The witness felt it left when it saw them. A gate malfunctioned just prior to the sighting.
bust_reasoning: The bust score is 45 because the sighting involves two witnesses and describes an object with several unusual features that resist easy prosaic explanation: its very large size (2-3 Blackhawks long), complete silence at a relatively low altitude (500-3000 ft above tree line), and rapid disappearance within 5-10 seconds. The primary witness's 15 years of experience with military aircraft and drones, and her statement of never seeing anything like it, adds weight. However, it is a visual-only sighting, and the reported kinematics (hovering, slow movement) are not extreme, preventing a lower score.
full_text:
# FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 4 - Page 1

FD-302 (Rev. 5-8-10)

- 1 of 2 -

[redacted]
FEDERAL BUREAU OF INVESTIGATION

[OFFICIAL RECORD: Document participants have digitally signed. All signatures have been verified by a certified FBI information system.]

Date of entry 10/[redacted]/2023

[redacted] On September [redacted] 2023, [redacted] [redacted] and [redacted] and FBI Special Agent [redacted] [redacted] interviewed [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] office and [redacted] cell), in Building [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] the [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] and supervisor sat in on the interview. After being advised of the identity of the interviewing agents and the nature of the interview, [redacted] [redacted] provided the following information:

[redacted] had been the [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] / [redacted] at [redacted] [redacted] for [redacted] years.

[redacted] On [redacted] September [redacted] 2023, [redacted] was with [redacted] contractors working on a special project with [redacted] She had restricted the air space in [redacted] for the upcoming tests. At 7:02 am, the contractors received the bases' standard [redacted] ([redacted] brief, got into three vehicles, and began driving to the site they were going to use for testing.

[redacted] [redacted] drove the first vehicle with [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] as the front passenger. [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] and [redacted] were in the second and third vehicles.

[redacted] Between 7:15 and 7:30 am, [redacted] drove down [redacted] to a gate that restricted access to part of the [redacted] [redacted] attempted to open the gate remotely using a fob. The gate opened just a little and then closed on three separate tries. On the fourth attempt the gate opened completely and stayed open. There were no prior operational problems with that particular gate and there were no operating issues with the gate after September [redacted].

[redacted] As [redacted] was driving through the gate she looked up and saw a [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] [redacted].

Investigation on 09/[redacted]/2023 at [redacted] [redacted] United States (In Person)

File # [redacted] [redacted]
Date drafted 10/[redacted]/2023

by [redacted] [redacted]

This document contains neither recommendations nor conclusions of the FBI. It is the property of the FBI and is loaned to your agency; it and its contents are not to be distributed outside your agency.



# FBI September 2023 Sighting - Serial 4 - Page 2

FD-302a (Rev. 5-8-10)

[redacted] [redacted]
[redacted] [redacted] September 2023 [redacted] UAP
Continuation of FD-302 of [redacted] [redacted] , On 09/[redacted]/2023 , Page 2 of 2

cigar shaped object with an extremely bright light southwest of them approximately 500 to 3000 feet above the nearest tree line (agent note: the tree line was approximately one mile south west of [redacted] position). The object was already there when she looked up. The object was almost hovering, slowly moving from east to west. The light was an intense diamond white light with what appeared to be a ring around the light and was located on the eastern end of the object. The light was pointing south east and looking at it (the light) was like looking into the sun. The object was “metallic bronze in color” and was the length of two or three Blackhawk helicopters lined up nose to tail. The width of the object was approximately the width of one and a half Blackhawks but was hard to determine due the light on the object’s eastern end which may have been obscuring part of the body. The object was completely silent.

[redacted] was initially annoyed when she saw the object because she had restricted the ranges for the tests they were going to conduct that morning but then she realized the object was not an aircraft or drone. [redacted] inched her vehicle forward while she and [redacted] watched the object. They watched the object for five to ten seconds and then the object just disappeared. The sky was clear with no clouds and the object did leave any contrails. [redacted] and [redacted] searched the sky but did not see the object again. [redacted] did not notice any interference with her vehicle’s engine while the object was visible. She only observed the one object and felt it left when it saw them.

[redacted] drove to the test site where [redacted] who was a passenger in the second vehicle said he saw the object too.

[redacted] would not have reported the object if she had seen it by herself. Several of her co-workers subsequently made fun of her due to her report.

[redacted] No photos or video of the object were taken by [redacted] or the contractors. [redacted] had seen most of the aircraft and drones used by the US military during her fifteen years working at [redacted] [redacted] [redacted] and had never seen anything like the object she observed.

[redacted] [redacted]
cover_up_reasoning: The document exhibits routine redaction of personal identifying information (names, dates, specific locations/facilities) and standard FOIA boilerplate. While extensive, these redactions are typical for an FBI report and do not indicate substantial concealment of the incident's nature or classified follow-ups, nor do they contradict public statements.
title_zh: 联邦调查局2023年9月目击事件 - 编号4
summary_zh: 这是一份联邦调查局对一名美国公民进行的302号访谈记录，内容涉及其在美国某试验场亲身经历的UAP（不明空中现象）遭遇。该证人（一名美国人员）描述了一个雪茄形物体，呈金属青铜色，并发出强烈钻石白色光。该物体被观察到悬停并缓慢地从东向西移动，随后消失。证人还报告称，在目击事件发生前，一扇大门出现故障。另一名承包商也目击了该物体。
reported_object_description_zh: 一个雪茄形物体，其东端发出极其明亮、强烈的钻石白色光，周围有光环。该光线指向东南，犹如直视太阳。该物体呈“金属青铜色”，长度相当于两到三架“黑鹰”直升机首尾相接，宽度约为一架半“黑鹰”直升机。该物体完全无声。
reported_behavior_zh: 该物体几乎悬停，缓慢地从东向西移动。随后在五到十秒后消失。证人感觉该物体在发现他们后便离开了。就在目击事件发生前，一扇大门出现故障。
bust_reasoning_zh: 排除分数为45分，因为此次目击事件涉及两名证人，并描述了一个具有数个异常特征的物体，这些特征难以用普通解释来澄清：其尺寸非常巨大（长达2-3架“黑鹰”直升机），在相对较低的高度（树线以上500-3000英尺）完全无声，以及在5-10秒内迅速消失。主要证人拥有15年军用飞机和无人机经验，且其声明从未见过类似物体，这增加了可信度。然而，这仅为视觉目击，且所报告的运动学特征（悬停、缓慢移动）并非极端，从而未能获得更低的分数。
cover_up_reasoning_zh: 该文件显示了对个人身份信息（姓名、日期、具体地点/设施）的例行性编辑以及标准的《信息自由法》样板条款。尽管编辑范围广泛，但这些编辑对于联邦调查局报告而言是典型的，并不表明对事件性质或机密后续行动存在实质性隐瞒，也不与公开声明相矛盾。
claims: Witness observed a cigar-shaped object with an intense diamond white light.
Object was metallic bronze in color and silent.
Object was hovering and slowly moving, then disappeared.
A gate malfunctioned prior to the sighting.
Another witness also saw the object.
claims_zh: 证人观察到一个雪茄形物体，发出强烈钻石白色光。
物体呈金属青铜色且无声。
物体悬停并缓慢移动，随后消失。
在目击事件发生前，一扇大门出现故障。
另一名证人也看到了该物体。
bust_explanations: A large, silent, cigar-shaped drone or airship prototype. This could account for the reported size, shape, silence, slow movement, and the witness's inability to identify it despite extensive experience with military aircraft. The bright light could be a powerful onboard light or a strong reflection.

An unusual atmospheric optical phenomenon or reflection from a high-altitude object. The 'extremely bright diamond white light with a ring around it, like looking into the sun' at sunrise could be a strong reflection off a distant object (e.g., a specialized balloon or satellite) combined with atmospheric effects. The 'cigar shape' and 'metallic bronze' color could be a perception of the object's body under specific lighting conditions.

A large, silent, high-altitude balloon. This could explain the cigar shape, large size, silence, and slow movement. The bright light would be a reflection of the sun. However, the rapid disappearance after 5-10 seconds is less typical for a balloon unless it quickly moved out of sight or was obscured by terrain, though the sky was reported clear.
bust_explanations_zh: 一种大型、无声的雪茄形无人机或飞艇原型。这可以解释所报告的尺寸、形状、无声、缓慢移动以及证人尽管拥有丰富的军用飞机经验却无法识别它的情况。亮光可能是一个强大的机载灯光或强烈的反射。
一种不寻常的大气光学现象或来自高空物体的反射。日出时“极其明亮的钻石白色光，周围有光环，犹如直视太阳”可能是一个遥远物体（例如，一个特殊气球或卫星）的强烈反射，并结合了大气效应。“雪茄形”和“金属青铜色”可能是物体在特定光照条件下的感知。
一个大型、无声的高空气球。这可以解释雪茄形、大尺寸、无声和缓慢移动。亮光将是太阳的反射。然而，在5-10秒后迅速消失对于气球来说不太典型，除非它迅速移出视线或被地形遮挡，尽管据报告天空晴朗。
cover_up_indicators_zh: 具体日期被编辑（例如，2023年10月/[已编辑]日，2023年9月[已编辑]）
具体地点/设施被编辑（例如，[已编辑] [已编辑] [已编辑] [已编辑]号楼，[已编辑] [已编辑] [已编辑]）
